The update of StreetPass

off while updating.

To use this feature, you must accept
the terms of the Nintendo 3DS
Service User Agreement. In System
Settings, select Internet Settings >
Other Information > User Agreement
and agree to the terms.

Internet Settings can be found
under the System Settings.

To communicate over the Internet,
turn wireless communication on by
pushing the wireless switch.

An error has occurred.
Please try connecting again later.

To prevent data updates after using
Send in battle, set “Update data
upon Send” to “No” under Tactics >
Config on the menu screen.

<size=110%>About connecting the game to the network:</size>
To further enjoy the game, the following bonuses become available
when connected to the network.
————————————————————————————————————————————————
<align="left"><indent=5%>• Summoning other players’ characters for help in battle
• Sending registered moves for other players to use
• Registering friends playing the game to your friend list,
and abilinking with them to use abilities they have learned

*You will be connected to the service automatically when a network becomes available during play.
*Network connection settings can be adjusted in the Config menu.
*A network connection is not required to play the game.
</indent></align>
————————————————————————————————————————————————
<size=110%>The following information will be visible to other players when using network functions:</size>
<align="left"><indent=15%>Account icon; user name; comments; in-game language settings;
and character’s jobs, equipment, levels, stats, special moves, special move dialogue, etc.</indent></align>
————————————————————————————————————————————————
<size=110%>You must accept the terms of the User Agreement in order to use network functions.</size>

Please confirm that you agree to our Terms of Service.

Connect the game to the network?
<size=90%>Please review the User Agreement before accepting.</size>
View the Privacy Notice <size=70%>(will open in a browser)</size>
View the User Agreement <size=70%>(will open in a browser)</size>
Agree to the terms and connect to the network
Do not connect to the network

• Registering friends playing the game to your friend list,

*Network connection settings can be adjusted in the Config menu.
*A network connection is not required to play the game.</indent></align>
————————————————————————————————————————————————
<size=110%>Please check the Nintendo Switch 2 console’s network connection settings.</size>
